ast.name: alert
ast.source: A template with this name already exists. Please choose a different name.
ast.target: 已存在同名模板。请选择一个不同的名称。

ast.name: alert
ast.source: Non-Markdown status data exported to vault.
ast.target: 非 Markdown 状态数据已导出到保险库。

ast.name: alert
ast.source: Non-Markdown status data imported from vault.
ast.target: 非 Markdown 状态数据已从保险库导入。

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: Are you sure you want to delete this template? This action cannot be undone.
ast.target: 您确定要删除此模板吗？此操作无法撤销。

ast.name: error
ast.source: forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported
ast.target: forceFrameRate 接受 0 到 125 之间的正整数，不支持强制设置高于 125 fps 的帧率

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to sync settings to external file:
ast.target: 同步设置到外部文件失败：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to load settings from external file:
ast.target: 从外部文件加载设置失败：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to fetch Lucide icon list
ast.target: 获取 Lucide 图标列表失败

ast.name: error
ast.source: getRightLeaf return null, unable to setup the view
ast.target: getRightLeaf 返回 null，无法设置视图

ast.name: error
ast.source: leaf not found, unable to activate the view
ast.target: 未找到 leaf，无法激活视图

ast.name: error
ast.source: open status modal failed because there is no markdown file in the provided leaf
ast.target: 打开状态模态框失败，因为提供的 leaf 中没有 Markdown 文件

ast.name: error
ast.source: getRightLeaf return null, unable to setup the dashboard

ast.name: error
ast.source: leaf not found, unable to activate the dashboard
ast.target: 未找到 leaf，无法激活仪表板

ast.target: 将笔记状态应用到文件夹及子文件夹

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Cannot open Lucide icon modal without Obsidian app
ast.target: 没有 Obsidian 应用程序，无法打开 Lucide 图标模态框

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Could not find target container for editor toolbar button
ast.target: 找不到编辑器工具栏按钮的目标容器

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Select at least one file to change its status.
ast.target: 请至少选择一个文件以更改其状态。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The selected item is not a valid file.
ast.target: 所选项目不是有效文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This folder does not contain any files.
ast.target: 此文件夹不包含任何文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 所有笔记都已分配状态！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Status workflow for academic research and writing
ast.target: 用于学术研究与写作的状态工作流

ast.name: description
ast.source: A colorful set of workflow statuses with descriptive icons
ast.target: 一套色彩丰富、带有描述性图标的工作流状态集

ast.name: description
ast.source: Workflow for novelists and creative writers
ast.target: 面向小说家和创意写作者的工作流

ast.name: description
ast.source: A simplified set of essential workflow statuses to get you started.
ast.target: 一套简化的基础工作流状态集，助您快速上手。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A simplified set of essential workflow statuses
ast.target: 一套简化的基础工作流状态集

ast.name: description
ast.source: Status workflow for project management and tracking
ast.target: 用于项目管理与跟踪的状态工作流

ast.name: description
ast.source: Status workflow for a digital garden setup.
ast.target: 用于数字花园设置的状态工作流。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 转瞬即逝的想法；原始、未经处理的思绪

ast.name: description
ast.source: Early development; ideas that have begun to take shape
ast.target: 早期发展；已开始成形的想法

ast.name: description
ast.source: Structured notes; clear, standalone ideas in my own words
ast.target: 结构化笔记；清晰、独立的想法，用自己的话表达

ast.name: description
ast.source: Mature knowledge; deep, developed, and connected ideas
ast.target: 成熟的知识；深入、发展完善且相互关联的想法

ast.name: description
ast.source: Big picture; collections of ideas working together
ast.target: 全局视角；协同工作的想法集合

ast.name: description
ast.target: 已归档；旧的或未使用的笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inspiration; unprocessed or lightly processed sources
ast.target: 灵感；未经处理或轻度处理的来源

ast.name: description
ast.source: Usable resources; processed sources that I have engaged with and learned from
ast.target: 可用资源；已处理、我已接触并从中学习的来源

ast.name: description
ast.source: Workflow for managing first iteration of note-taking, starting second iteration, reviewing, and completing
ast.target: 用于管理笔记首次迭代、启动二次迭代、审阅和完成的工作流

ast.name: description
ast.source: Note creation and initial addition of content
ast.target: 笔记创建与初始内容添加

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reviewing note and adding anything that might be missed
ast.target: 审阅笔记并补充可能遗漏的内容

ast.name: description
ast.source: A unique name for your template

ast.name: description
ast.source: Brief description of the template's purpose

ast.name: description
ast.source: Categorize your template (e.g. Academic, Project Management, Writing, General)
ast.target: 为您的模板分类（例如：学术、项目管理、写作、通用）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Primary language of the statuses in this template
ast.target: 此模板中状态的主要语言

ast.name: description
ast.source: Define the statuses included in this template, including emojis and optional Lucide icons
ast.target: 定义此模板中包含的状态，包括表情符号和可选的 Lucide 图标

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically apply this status to newly created notes.
ast.target: 自动将此状态应用于新创建的笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allow notes to have multiple statuses at the same time
ast.target: 允许笔记同时拥有多个状态

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose how the status frontmatter value is stored when multiple statuses are disabled. String format improves compatibility with plugins like TaskNotes.
ast.target: 当禁用多状态时，选择状态前置元数据值的存储格式。字符串格式可提高与 TaskNotes 等插件的兼容性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show a folder context menu option that also processes notes inside nested folders.
ast.target: 显示文件夹上下文菜单选项，该选项也会处理嵌套文件夹内的笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: YAML frontmatter tag name for status (default: obsidian-note-status)
ast.target: 状态的 YAML 前置元数据标签名称（默认：obsidian-note-status）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only show statuses that are defined in templates or custom statuses. ⚠️ WARNING: When enabled, any unknown statuses will be automatically removed when modifying file statuses.
ast.target: 仅显示在模板或自定义状态中定义的状态。⚠️ 警告：启用后，修改文件状态时，任何未知状态都将被自动移除。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Map templates or individual statuses to specific YAML keys. These mappings only apply to Markdown files with frontmatter.
ast.target: 将模板或单个状态映射到特定的 YAML 键。这些映射仅适用于具有前置元数据的 Markdown 文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, statuses mapped to custom frontmatter keys are also written to the default status tag.
ast.target: 启用后，映射到自定义前置元数据键的状态也会写入默认状态标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disable dashboard and grouped view for vaults with more notes than this limit to improve performance. Set to 0 to disable this feature.
ast.target: 为笔记数量超过此限制的保险库禁用仪表板和分组视图以提高性能。设置为 0 可禁用此功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hide default template statuses and use only your custom statuses
ast.target: 隐藏默认模板状态，仅使用您的自定义状态

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create custom statuses with emoji icons and optional Lucide icon names plus colors. All statuses require a name.
ast.target: 创建带有表情符号图标和可选 Lucide 图标名称及颜色的自定义状态。所有状态都需要一个名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Status templates and their enabled status.
ast.target: 状态模板及其启用状态。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 所有状态的自定义颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Icons, frames, status bar, and toolbar styles.
ast.target: 图标、边框、状态栏和工具栏样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Multi-status, strict mode, and overview popups.
ast.target: 多状态、严格模式和概览弹窗。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Frontmatter keys, mappings, and tag prefix.
ast.target: 前置元数据键、映射和标签前缀。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Quick commands, experiments, and vault limits.
ast.target: 快速命令、实验功能和保险库限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically save and load selected plugin settings from a file in your vault.
ast.target: 自动将选定的插件设置保存到保险库中的文件并从中加载。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the JSON file where settings will be stored (relative to vault root).
ast.target: 存储设置的 JSON 文件路径（相对于保险库根目录）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Store non-Markdown status data in a vault file instead of the internal plugin folder.
ast.target: 将非 Markdown 状态数据存储在保险库文件中，而不是内部插件文件夹中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the JSON file where non-Markdown statuses will be stored.
ast.target: 存储非 Markdown 状态的 JSON 文件路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display a status icon in the status bar with the current note status.
ast.target: 在状态栏中显示一个状态图标，显示当前笔记状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically hide the status icon whenever the current note does not have a status.
ast.target: 当当前笔记没有状态时，自动隐藏状态图标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show a popup listing statuses when hovering or interacting with the status icon.
ast.target: 当悬停或与状态图标交互时，显示一个列出状态的弹窗。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Control how the template name is shown alongside the current status.
ast.target: 控制模板名称如何与当前状态一起显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Match the file explorer visuals: accent stripe, solid fill, or dot marker.
ast.target: 匹配文件资源管理器的视觉样式：强调色条、纯色填充或圆点标记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose whether the badge shows icon, text, both, or an empty accent.
ast.target: 选择徽章显示图标、文本、两者兼有还是仅显示强调色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Pick what text should be shown in the status bar when a note does not have a status.
ast.target: 选择当笔记没有状态时，状态栏应显示的文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display the unknown status icon in the status bar next to the custom text.
ast.target: 在状态栏中自定义文本旁显示未知状态图标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display the custom text in the status bar whenever no status is set.
ast.target: 当未设置状态时，在状态栏中显示自定义文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a button to the editor toolbar to change the note status.
ast.target: 在编辑器工具栏中添加一个按钮以更改笔记状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose where the status button should appear in the editor toolbar.
ast.target: 选择状态按钮在编辑器工具栏中的显示位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Control which editors should display the toolbar button.
ast.target: 控制哪些编辑器应显示工具栏按钮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display a status icon for each file inside the file explorer.
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器中为每个文件显示状态图标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose where the icon should be rendered next to the file name.
ast.target: 选择图标应渲染在文件名旁边的哪个位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Do not render a status icon in the explorer when a note status cannot be determined.
ast.target: 当无法确定笔记状态时，不在资源管理器中渲染状态图标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Apply the active status color to the filename text inside the file explorer.
ast.target: 将活动状态颜色应用于文件资源管理器内的文件名文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tint the entire file explorer list item with the active status color.
ast.target: 用活动状态颜色为整个文件资源管理器列表项着色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render a subtle colored strip on the left edge of the file explorer item.
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器项目的左边缘渲染一条微妙的彩色条带。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Append a compact colored dot next to the filename as an extra status indicator.
ast.target: 在文件名旁附加一个紧凑的彩色圆点作为额外的状态指示器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Adds a colored underline below the filename without changing the text color.
ast.target: 在文件名下方添加彩色下划线，而不改变文本颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose whether to display a frame around the status icon inside the file explorer.
ast.target: 选择是否在文件资源管理器内的状态图标周围显示边框。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Decide whether icons use their configured status colors or inherit the theme default.
ast.target: 决定图标是使用其配置的状态颜色还是继承主题默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Emoji or Lucide icon name displayed whenever a note does not have a status.
ast.target: 当笔记没有状态时显示的Emoji或Lucide图标名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hex color used for unknown statuses (e.g., #8b949e).
ast.target: 用于未知状态的十六进制颜色（例如，#8b949e）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unlock beta views that are still under development.
ast.target: 解锁仍处于开发阶段的测试版视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show the ribbon shortcut to open the status dashboard view.
ast.target: 显示打开状态仪表板视图的快捷功能区。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show the ribbon shortcut to open the grouped status view.
ast.target: 显示打开分组状态视图的快捷功能区。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable predefined workflows or define your own statuses.
ast.target: 启用预定义的工作流程或定义您自己的状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose statuses with command palette shortcuts.
ast.target: 通过命令面板快捷键选择状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Icon, popup, badge style/content, and no-status behavior.
ast.target: 图标、弹出窗口、徽章样式/内容以及无状态行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Button placement and visibility across panes.
ast.target: 按钮在窗格中的放置和可见性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Icon placement, hiding unknown, and visual styling options.
ast.target: 图标放置、隐藏未知项以及视觉样式选项。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fallback icon and color when a note lacks status.
ast.target: 当笔记缺少状态时的后备图标和颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Multi-status mode, tag key, mappings, and vault safeguards.
ast.target: 多状态模式、标签键、映射和保险库保护措施。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keep custom statuses and templates in sync across multiple devices.
ast.target: 在多台设备间同步自定义状态和模板。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Opt into dashboard and grouped view previews.
ast.target: 选择加入仪表板和分组视图预览。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 递归应用状态到子文件夹

ast.source: Write mapped tags to default status tag
ast.target: 将映射的标签写入默认状态标签

ast.source: Hide icon when note has no status

ast.source: Show template names next to status
ast.target: 在状态旁显示模板名称

ast.source: Custom text when note has no status
ast.target: 笔记无状态时的自定义文本

ast.source: Show icon when note has no status
ast.target: 笔记无状态时显示图标

ast.source: Show text when note has no status

ast.target: 显示编辑器工具栏按钮

ast.target: 编辑器工具栏按钮位置

ast.target: 为以下对象显示工具栏按钮

ast.name: name
ast.source: Show status icons in file explorer
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器中显示状态图标

ast.name: name
ast.source: Status icon position in file explorer
ast.target: 文件资源管理器中的状态图标位置

ast.name: name
ast.source: Hide icon when file status is unknown
ast.target: 文件状态未知时隐藏图标

ast.name: name
ast.source: Color filename text using status color
ast.target: 使用状态颜色为文件名文本着色

ast.name: name
ast.source: Color the file explorer block based on status
ast.target: 根据状态为文件资源管理器块着色

ast.name: name
ast.target: 使用状态颜色为文件名添加下划线

ast.target: 将状态粘贴到当前笔记

ast.target: 例如：用于项目管理的状态工作流
